mapper.update:
update base_org_hos_clean set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};
update hos_clean set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};

update base_org_drug_store set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};
update drug_store set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};

update base_org_company set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};
update company set status=#{updateStatus.status}, updatetime=now(), remarks =
CONCAT(remarks,';', #{updateStatus.remark})
remarks
where data_id = #{updateStatus.dataId};
mapper.delete: delete from base_org_hos_clean where data_id = #{dataId}; delete from hos_clean where data_id = #{dataId};
delete from base_org_drug_store where data_id = #{dataId}; delete from drug_store where data_id = #{dataId};
delete from base_org_company where data_id = #{dataId}; delete from company where data_id = #{dataId};
